title: Section 12
content: 1[12. Punishment for abetment of offences.-- Whoever abets any offence punishable under this Act, whether or not that offence is committed in consequence of that abetment, shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than three years, but which may extend to seven years and shall also be liable to fine.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 6, ibid., for section 12 (w.e.f. 26-7-2018).
